product: Delta Sharing supports sharing tables and schemas secured by ABAC policies…
tagline: Delta Sharing providers can now add tables and schemas secured by attribute based access control (ABAC) to a Delta share.
what_it_does: Delta Sharing providers can now add tables and schemas secured by attribute based access control (ABAC) to a Delta share. The policy does not govern the recipient's access, so recipients have full access to the shared asset. Recipients can apply their own ABAC policies.
why_it_matters: The policy does not govern the recipient's access, so recipients have full access to the shared asset.
key_takeaway: Delta Sharing providers can now add tables and schemas secured by attribute based access control (ABAC) to a Delta share.
